title: IIM Lucknow Senior Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Senior Research Assistant Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIM Lucknow website. The last date to submit the application form is 31-05-2026.

basic_details.job_title: IIM Lucknow Senior Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) has released an official notification for the recruitment of Senior Research Assistant Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIM Lucknow website. The last date to submit the application form is 31-05-2026.

age_limit.details: Age relaxation will be as per the applicable norms. Specific age limits are not mentioned in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree (regular mode) with specialisation in Statistics from a reputed university or institute with a minimum 60% marks.
qualification.details: Senior Research Assistant: Postgraduate degree (regular mode) with specialisation in Statistics from a reputed university or institute with a minimum 60% marks. At least two years of relevant full-time professional experience, with a strong preference for research-oriented roles. Preference shall be given to candidates with experience in publishing quality research papers employing statistical methods.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 50,000/- consolidated per month, plus HRA
salary_details.details: Fellowship of Rs. 50,000/- consolidated per month, plus HRA as per applicable norms.

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Shortlisting of candidates Interview (online or at IIM Lucknow Campus) Selection based on qualifications
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Lucknow to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Senior Research Assistant post at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Senior Research Assistant position at IIM Lucknow is 31st May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree (regular mode) with a specialization in Statistics from a reputed university or institute, securing a minimum of 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any work experience required for the Senior Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Yes, at least two years of relevant full-time professional experience is required, with a preference for research-oriented roles and publishing quality research papers.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated fellowship of Rs. 50,000/- per month, along with HRA as per applicable norms.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Senior Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted online through the provided Google Forms link on or before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, shortlisting of candidates, and an interview, with the final selection based on qualifications, experience, and the personal interaction.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this post?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Senior Research Assistant position is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. What are the desirable qualifications for the Senior Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include a Graduate degree in Statistics, knowledge of R, Python, Excel, Latex, and efficiency in written English.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIM Lucknow located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow is located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 226013.
